title: FSSAI milk safety survey following Lumpy Skin Disease
scope: An official survey baseline focused on selected safety parameters in milk following Lumpy Skin Disease. It is not a complete inventory of every adulteration issue reported in news coverage.
scope_notes: News reports may discuss water dilution, detergent, urea, synthetic milk or caustic soda.
Those issues should not be treated as tested by this survey unless the underlying report explicitly includes them.

title: FSSAI Edible Oil Survey 2020
scope: An official structured and laboratory-tested baseline for edible-oil quality, safety, adulteration indicators and misbranding.
scope_notes: Numerical findings are intentionally omitted until validated report data are supplied.
Future comparison records will preserve the distinction between tested parameters and issues outside survey scope.
